query_normalized: climate-smart agricultural practices in rural areas to improve food security agriculture
rationale: The paper focuses on computer vision techniques (semantic segmentation, augmentation invariance) for analyzing aerial images, which is a methodological tool rather than a study of the biological, social, or economic mechanisms linking agricultural practices to food security.
